overall.description: Spider-Man perched on a high-rise building ledge overlooking a bustling Times Square-style urban intersection. The scene features modern glass skyscrapers with digital billboards, moderate traffic flow below, and clear midday lighting. Video game footage with cinematic quality.

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man crouched on building ledge, surveying the city street and traffic below

entered.detail: tall glass facade building with reflective windows towering over the street
tall building covered with multiple large digital billboards and advertisements
cluster of illuminated advertising screens on building facade displaying colorful content
multi-lane street with crosswalks, yellow taxis, and moving traffic visible below
concrete ledge of skyscraper where character is perched, with metal railing visible

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man sits perched on a high-rise building ledge overlooking a vibrant downtown intersection reminiscent of Times Square. Modern glass skyscrapers flank the view with large digital billboards illuminating the scene, while moderate traffic and pedestrians move through the streets below. The camera remains stationary behind the character, capturing the bustling urban environment from an elevated vantage point under clear midday sunlight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, elevated perspective of a vibrant urban intersection that emphasizes the scale of a modern metropolis. It begins with the camera positioned behind Spider-Man as he sits perched on a high-rise building ledge, overlooking a bustling downtown scene reminiscent of Times Square. The view captures the interplay between the stationary character and the constant motion of moderate traffic and pedestrians flowing through the streets below. As the gaze lingers, the scene highlights the surrounding glass skyscrapers and the glow of large digital billboards under the clarity of midday sunlight.
